texto: I was not out to paint beautiful pictures
autor: even painting good pictures was not important to me. I wanted only to help the truth burst forth.
explicacao: Citação de even painting good pictures was not important to me. I wanted only to help the truth burst forth. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “I was not out to paint beautiful pictures” articula reflexao, alice-miller, paint em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
